summary_en: ROE exceeding weighted average cost of capital and PBR target of 1.0 or above. Medium-term plan 'NOZAWA NEXT3' approved with specific capital efficiency and market valuation improvement initiatives. Execution framework effective from announcement date (May 15, 2026).
title_en: Notice regarding initiatives toward realizing capital-cost and share-price conscious management
translation_en_brief: Nozawa Corporation announced on 15 May 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to implement a capital-cost and share-price conscious management framework. The company established two primary targets: achievement of return on equity (ROE) exceeding its weighted average cost of capital (WACC), and a price-to-book ratio (PBR) target of 1.0 or above. These targets are positioned as key management objectives to drive sustainable improvement in enterprise value. The company has formulated a medium-term management plan titled 'NOZAWA NEXT3' that consolidates specific initiatives aimed at enhancing capital efficiency and improving market valuation. Going forward, management will emphasize disciplined capital management aligned with these targets and commit to continuous improvements in capital productivity and market recognition.
